summary: The local update/uninstall prompt package, synchronized documentation, and 0.4.9 release metadata are ready. APK creation is blocked because the repository has no Android packaging surface. Runtime `pnpm happytg verify` is environment-blocked in the isolated worktree by missing .env/Telegram token and local port conflicts, while release-check, lint, typecheck, test, and build passed.

checks.name: prompt
checks.detail: Reusable prompt artifact exists and includes 10-role critique plus update/uninstall/release/APK gates.

checks.name: docs
checks.detail: README, quickstart, installation, bootstrap, troubleshooting, self-hosting, runbook, release-process, changelog, and release notes were updated.

checks.name: release-metadata
checks.detail: Workspace package versions, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/releases/0.4.9.md are aligned; release check passed.

checks.name: repo-checks
checks.detail: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, lint, typecheck, test, build, and task validation passed.

checks.name: happytg-verify
checks.detail: Environment-blocked in isolated worktree: .env and TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN are absent; ports 3001/80/443/3000 are occupied.

checks.name: apk
checks.detail: Blocked: no Android packaging files exist, so no phone-installable APK was produced.

residualRisks: The documentation release does not add runtime CLI behavior; it documents the current supported paths and provides a future-agent prompt.
A future APK release requires a real Android packaging implementation before artifact publication.
